name: Product Navigator
description: Helps teams quickly access structured product knowledge without manually searching across documents or systems. Supports faster information access and decision support.

name: Call Audit
description: Reviews and analyzes call conversations automatically. Evaluates call quality, compliance, and PA performance using dashboards and insights.

name: Sales Pitch
description: Creates and stores customized sales pitches based on lead information, improving preparation speed and consistency for the Sales team.

name: Content Crafter
description: AI-powered platform used internally to create educational content, training materials, and assessments. Supports content and learning teams.

name: Class Of One
description: Internal AI tutor platform providing personalized one-on-one learning support with instant feedback and grading assistance.

name: HDFC Dashboard
description: Tracks and visualizes the lead funnel using performance metrics, dashboards, and natural language reporting. Built for BFSI usage.

name: VEDA
description: Internal AI platform supporting domain-specific automation and knowledge workflows.

name: Tax Reply
description: Automates structured tax-related query drafting and response generation.

name: Data Analytics: MIS
description: Generates MIS reports, dashboards, and performance analytics insights.

name: INDAS
description: AI-assisted compliance and accounting analysis support platform.

name: Contract Reader
description: Extracts and analyzes contract documents for key clauses and information.

name: Contract Obligation Abstractor
description: Identifies contractual obligations and summarizes compliance requirements.

name: Personal Assistance
description: AI assistant supporting scheduling, drafting, and internal coordination tasks.

name: Resume Screening
description: Automatically screens and evaluates resumes for recruitment teams.

name: Content (CASSE)
description: Internal content generation and assessment support platform.

name: VISTA (Training Delivery)
description: Supports training execution and learner engagement workflows.

name: Sales Assistant
description: Provides sales teams with AI-driven lead insights and structured selling support.

name: Learning Mentor
description: AI support tool for learners offering feedback and progress guidance.

name: OCR (Invoice Analysis)
description: Extracts structured information from invoices using OCR and AI analysis.
